title: 7 Best Moosend Alternatives in 2025 (Free & Paid)
meta_description: Compare top Moosend alternatives. Find the best email marketing tool for your business with free trials and pricing comparisons.
intro: While Moosend offers solid email marketing at a low cost, you might be looking for alternatives that better fit your specific needs—whether that's advanced automation, specialized features for creators, or multi-channel capabilities. We've compared the top alternatives to help you find the right platform for your business.
why_switch: Need specialized features like webinars, SMS, or e-commerce integrations not available in Moosend
Looking for better customer support or improved user experience with a more intuitive interface
Require advanced automation, CRM functionality, or analytics tailored to your industry

alternatives.name: MailerLite
alternatives.tagline: Simple email marketing for small businesses
alternatives.best_for: small businesses and freelancers on a budget
alternatives.key_difference: MailerLite matches Moosend's $9 starting price with the same 1,000 free subscriber limit, but offers a more intuitive drag-and-drop editor and better customer support. It's the closest direct competitor if you want similar pricing without sacrificing usability.

alternatives.name: ConvertKit
alternatives.key_difference: ConvertKit is purpose-built for content creators with visual automation workflows and subscriber tagging that exceed Moosend's capabilities. If you're monetizing your audience through digital products or memberships, ConvertKit's creator-focused features provide better value despite the higher $29 starting price.

alternatives.name: Beehiiv
alternatives.tagline: The newsletter platform built for growth
alternatives.key_difference: Beehiiv excels for newsletter publishers with built-in monetization tools, an ad network, and referral programs that Moosend doesn't offer. Its more generous 2,500 free subscriber limit makes it an excellent choice if you're serious about building a profitable newsletter business.

alternatives.name: Brevo
alternatives.key_difference: Brevo stands out with an exceptionally generous free tier (100,000 subscribers) plus multi-channel capabilities including SMS, WhatsApp, and live chat. It's ideal if you need to communicate across multiple channels or send high volumes of transactional emails.

alternatives.name: ActiveCampaign
alternatives.best_for: businesses needing advanced automation and CRM
alternatives.key_difference: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing with a full CRM, lead scoring, and advanced automation workflows that far exceed Moosend's capabilities. While it starts at $15 without a free tier, it's the right choice if you need enterprise-grade marketing automation and sales integration.

alternatives.name: Mailchimp
alternatives.key_difference: Mailchimp is the most established option with the broadest feature set, though its smaller free tier (500 subscribers) and higher starting price ($13) may offset the value for budget-conscious users. It's best if you value brand recognition and want to grow into an integrated marketing platform.

alternatives.name: GetResponse
alternatives.best_for: online course creators and webinar hosts
alternatives.key_difference: GetResponse uniquely bundles email marketing with webinars, online courses, and conversion funnels at a $19 starting price. It's the ideal alternative if you need webinar hosting or course delivery functionality alongside your email campaigns.

faq.q: What is the best free alternative to Moosend?
faq.a: Brevo offers the most generous free tier with 100,000 subscribers at no cost, plus multi-channel features like SMS and WhatsApp. If you want a closer Moosend equivalent with 1,000 free subscribers, both MailerLite and ConvertKit match that limit while offering more polished user interfaces.

faq.q: What is the best Moosend alternative for small business?
faq.a: MailerLite is the top choice for small businesses, offering identical pricing ($9/month starting), the same 1,000 free subscriber limit, and comparable features with better ease of use. For slightly more advanced needs, ActiveCampaign provides superior automation and CRM capabilities starting at $15/month.

faq.q: Is there a cheaper alternative to Moosend?
faq.a: Brevo is significantly cheaper, offering unlimited free emails to 100,000 subscribers—far exceeding Moosend's free tier. MailerLite matches Moosend's $9 starting price exactly, making it equally affordable with better features. If you need the absolute cheapest option, Brevo's free plan is unbeatable.
